name: google-for-education
description: Map Google for Education: Workspace, Classroom, Chromebooks/Flex, handoffs

steps.text: Hub: https://edu.google.com/intl/ALL_us/ — skill google-for-education. Official Google paths only. No student PII in Fable. Not legal/compliance advice. Editions and prices VERIFY LIVE.

steps.prompt: Using skill google-for-education and knowledge/education/google-for-education.md, produce gfe-plan: (1) verdict for user role (teacher/IT/leader/parent) (2) audience-route with links on https://edu.google.com/intl/ALL_us/ (3) edition-map — Fundamentals vs paid; point to compare-editions; no invented prices (4) classroom-setup if educator — classroom.google.com HITL (5) device-path — Chromebooks overview and/or chromeos-flex-install-prep for PC/Mac conversion (6) admin-checklist if IT (7) privacy-hygiene — no student PII in Fable; FERPA claims VERIFY LIVE (8) creative-class-handoff if media/stop-motion — Cloud Stop Motion + stop-motion-dev-kit (9) get-started-links (10) OPEN. Not educational or legal advice. User operates Google accounts HITL.
